Container.Name: AppFlowy-Redis
Container.Overview: Redis 7 in-memory cache and pub/sub broker for AppFlowy Cloud real-time collaboration and task queuing. Deploy second. Part of the AppFlowy Cloud stack.
Container.Description:
Redis 7 — in-memory data store used by AppFlowy Cloud for WebSocket pub/sub, caching, and background job queuing.

Deploy order: (1) AppFlowy-Postgres → (2) AppFlowy-Redis → (3) AppFlowy-MinIO → (4) AppFlowy-GoTrue → (5) AppFlowy-Cloud → (6) AppFlowy-Admin, AppFlowy-Web, AppFlowy-Worker, AppFlowy-Search → (7) AppFlowy-Nginx

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent storage for Redis RDB snapshots.

Config.Name: Redis Port (internal)
Config.Description: Redis port exposed to the appflowy Docker network. Change host port only if you need external access.
